final_answer: The action cannot proceed. SRC-BF347128E475-CTL explicitly states it does not close the required dependency for bank rail effective date preceding invoice release. Policy requires exact source closure before execution; no current record satisfies this requirement. Prior vendor history, urgent tone, and vendor communication cannot override source-control authority. The unresolved timing dependency blocks execution until control records are updated to close the bank rail dependency.
